AI & Education

Exploring how AI transforms education, work, and lifelong learning.

I synthesize research from OECD, UNESCO, and leading institutions to make complex AI education trends actionable for school leaders, policymakers, and educators.

AI literacy

The OECD Just Redefined What Every School Needs to Teach — And Most Are Already Behind

The new AILit Framework from OECD and European Commission sets the standard for AI literacy. With PISA 2029 on the horizon, the clock is ticking for education systems.

26 June 2026 · 5 min read
AI

The AI Productivity Paradox: What Leaders Get Wrong

New NBER research reveals a striking gap between how executives perceive AI's productivity impact and what actually shows up in revenue data.

25 June 2026 · 5 min read

Interactive Tools

Free assessments and resources to help you navigate AI in education.

Assessment

School AI Readiness Assessment

A 15-question diagnostic for school leaders to evaluate readiness for AI integration across five dimensions — infrastructure, staff literacy, policy, curriculum, and student skills.

15 questions · 5 min · Instant report
